title: कृष्ण पञ्चरत्नम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री कृष्ण पञ्चरत्नम् ॥

वंशीविभूषितकरान्नवनीरदाभात्
पीताम्बरादरुणबिम्बफलाधरोष्ठात्।
पूर्णेन्दुसुन्दरमुखात् अरविन्दनेत्रात्
कृष्णात् परं किमपि तत्त्वमहं न जाने॥ १॥

मन्दारमालापरिभूषितकुन्तलाग्रं
गोपाङ्गनाभिरवलोकितकुण्डलास्यम्।
कन्दर्पकोटिकमनीयविशेषशोभं
कृष्णात् परं किमपि तत्त्वमहं न जाने॥ २॥

वृन्दावने व्रजगवां चरणोत्थधूलि
धूसर्ययौ दधिमथन्नवनीतचौर्यम्।
मातुर्भयाद् अतिविहाय गृहं प्रविश्य
कृष्णात् परं किमपि तत्त्वमहं न जाने॥ ३॥

गोवर्धनोद्धरणलीलमनन्तवीर्यं
कालीयभोगनटनप्रतिभाविलासम्।
बालं मुकुन्दमखिलार्तिमनोविलासं
कृष्णात् परं किमपि तत्त्वमहं न जाने॥ ४॥

विद्यापतेस्तदिदमत्र भक्तिसारं
वक्तुं क्षमो न च मनो विषये गतं मे।
सच्चित्सुखाय परमात्मनि पूर्णरूपे
कृष्णात् परं किमपि तत्त्वमहं न जाने॥ ५॥

कृष्णपञ्चरत्नमिदं यः पठेद् भक्तितत्परः।
कृष्णसायुज्यमासाद्य मोक्षमेव लभेद् ध्रुवम्॥

॥ इति श्री कृष्ण पञ्चरत्नम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Krishna Pancharatnam ||

Vamshivibhushitakaraan Navaneeradabhat
Pitambarad Arunabimbaphaladharoshthat |
Purnendusundaramukhat Aravindanetrat
Krishnat Param Kimapi Tattvam Aham Na Jane || 1 ||

Mandaramalaparibhushitakuntalagram
Gopanganaabhir Avalokitakundalasyam |
Kandarpakotikamaneeyavisheshshobham
Krishnat Param Kimapi Tattvam Aham Na Jane || 2 ||

Vrindavane Vrajagavam Charanotthadhuli
Dhusarayau Dadhimathannavaneetachauryam |
Maturbhayad Ativihaya Griham Pravishya
Krishnat Param Kimapi Tattvam Aham Na Jane || 3 ||

Govardhanoddharanaleelam Anantaviryam
Kaliyabhoganaatanapratibhaavilasam |
Balam Mukundam Akhilartimanovilasam
Krishnat Param Kimapi Tattvam Aham Na Jane || 4 ||

Vidyapates Tadidam Atra Bhaktisaram
Vaktum Kshamo Na Cha Mano Vishaye Gatam Me |
Sachchitsukhaya Paramatmani Purnarupee
Krishnat Param Kimapi Tattvam Aham Na Jane || 5 ||

KrishnaPancharatnam Idam Yah Pathed Bhaktitatparah |
Krishnasayujyam Asadya Moksham Eva Labhed Dhruvam ||

|| Iti Shri Krishna Pancharatnam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
वंशी-विभूषित हाथ, नवमेघसमान कान्ति, पीताम्बर, बिम्बफलसम अधर, पूर्णचन्द्र मुख, अरविन्दनेत्र कृष्ण से परे कोई तत्त्व मैं नहीं जानता।

मन्दार माला से शोभित, गोपांगनाओं से देखे जाते कुण्डलमुख, करोड़ कामदेव से सुन्दर कृष्ण।

वृन्दावन में गौचरण धूलि से धूसरित, माखन चोर, माता के भय से घर में छिपते बालकृष्ण।

गोवर्धन उठाने वाले, कालियनाग पर नृत्य करने वाले बालमुकुन्द कृष्ण।

भक्ति से पढ़ने वाला कृष्णसायुज्य और मोक्ष प्राप्त करता है।
benefits: Five jewel-verses declaring Krishna as supreme reality
Captures the complete beauty of Krishna's divine form
Invokes Bal-Krishna, Gopala, and Govardhandhari forms
Ideal for Janmashtami, Holi, and daily Krishna bhajan
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Krishna, Krishna Pancharatnam (कृष्ण पञ्चरत्नम्) stands as five gems of devotional verses. Rooted in Adi Shankaracharya, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to capture the complete beauty of Krishna's divine form as well as invoke Bal-Krishna, Gopala, and Govardhandhari forms. Additionally, it is known to grant Krishna-sayujya (union) and moksha. It is especially recommended on Wednesday (Budhvar) and during Janmashtami and Holi for maximum spiritual benefit. The text contains 5 verses and takes around 3 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Krishna Pancharatnam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Krishna Pancharatnam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Five jewel-verses declaring Krishna as the supreme tattva for devotion.
